introduction: SYNOPSISUnable to bear children, Yun So-sa, the madam of the noble family of Hong, is staying at a sorceress' house in the mountain valley where a number of sorcerers live. So-sa does her best while staying there. She ends up having relations with sorcerer Se-du. Meanwhile, her husband Tae-ho takes a second wife. But when she doesn't conceive, Tae-ho goes to see So-sa at the sorcerers' village and stays a night. Afterwards, So-sa gets pregnant and returns home but Tae-ho finds out that it is not his child. He calls Se-du and has him perform an exorcism to kick out evil spirits. But as the exorcism hits its climax, Se-du kills Tae-ho, revealing the truth about who the baby's father is. The matriarch of the family demands So-sa to kill herself after she has given birth. However, the servant girl Bun-ie persuades So-sa to leave with her baby.故事承担mothayeo的deurideon定性留孩子在山萨满焦线的房子住在一起中等红champan房子的女主人熊与生活yunso SEDU巫师的关系。同时，香港champan房子，但有一个第二个妻子，她的丈夫也是taegi eopja太湖度过夜排在尤恩·索萨巫师村。然后taegi英俊yunso买回来进了屋，并champan太湖人，不知道他的孩子叫SEDU bujeonggut巫师，但杀太湖放固特异让所有的三个高峰期，其实原来。然而，流浪者让生了一个孩子的芸索，但随着侍女的劝说，她随着她的孩子消失了。
